title: centaurea × budaiana
intro: Centaurea × budaiana, also known as Blue Spur Celery or Wild Celery, is a perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea × budaiana include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
